description: validate a BibTeX file for completeness, format, duplicates, venue citation count, and manuscript cross-references (offline)
rules: read-only — JSON report written to record_store as validation.json
checks required/recommended fields per entry type, year + DOI format, page-range style, author separators
detects duplicate DOIs/keys and identical titles
VENUE (nature|science|cell|neurips|icml|iclr|cvpr|acl|review|nejm|lancet|jama|...) or MIN_COUNT enforces citation-count standards
MANUSCRIPT (.md/.tex) cross-checks cited keys vs defined entries (unresolved + unused)
DOI resolution (--check-dois) is NOT exposed by this perk, so it runs fully offline
usage: Set BIB_FILE. Optionally VENUE, MIN_COUNT, MANUSCRIPT. Output: validation.json.
limitation: Offline structural validation only — does not resolve DOIs over the network. Regex-based BibTeX parser.
